'''folayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:lobed|lobed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-l-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lobed|lobed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| folayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:folayithi|folayithi]] || [[word:folayiji|folayiji]] || [[word:folayishi|folayishi]] || [[word:folayiki|folayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:folayuthuthu|folayuthuthu]] || [[word:folayujuju|folayujuju]] || [[word:folayushushu|folayushushu]] || [[word:folayukuku|folayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:folayuthu|folayuthu]] || [[word:folayuju|folayuju]] || [[word:folayushu|folayushu]] || [[word:folayuku|folayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:folayufthuf|folayufthuf]] || [[word:folayufjuf|folayufjuf]] || [[word:folayufshuf|folayufshuf]] || [[word:folayufkuf|folayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:folayethe|folayethe]] || [[word:folayeje|folayeje]] || [[word:folayeshe|folayeshe]] || [[word:folayeke|folayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:folayothotho|folayothotho]] || [[word:folayojojo|folayojojo]] || [[word:folayoshosho|folayoshosho]] || [[word:folayokoko|folayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:folayotho|folayotho]] || [[word:folayojo|folayojo]] || [[word:folayosho|folayosho]] || [[word:folayoko|folayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:folayofthof|folayofthof]] || [[word:folayofjof|folayofjof]] || [[word:folayofshof|folayofshof]] || [[word:folayofkof|folayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:folayÃŸfthÃŸf|folayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:folayÃŸfjÃŸf|folayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:folayÃŸfshÃŸf|folayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:folayÃŸfkÃŸf|folayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:folayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|folayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:folayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|folayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:folayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|folayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:folayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|folayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:folayÃŸfthÃŸf|folayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:folayÃŸfjÃŸf|folayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:folayÃŸfshÃŸf|folayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:folayÃŸfkÃŸf|folayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:folayÃŸfthÃŸf|folayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:folayÃŸfjÃŸf|folayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:folayÃŸfshÃŸf|folayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:folayÃŸfkÃŸf|folayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:folayÃḊthÃḊ|folayÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:folayÃḊjÃḊ|folayÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:folayÃḊshÃḊ|folayÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:folayÃḊkÃḊ|folayÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:folayathatha|folayathatha]] || [[word:folayajaja|folayajaja]] || [[word:folayashasha|folayashasha]] || [[word:folayakaka|folayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:folayatha|folayatha]] || [[word:folayaja|folayaja]] || [[word:folayasha|folayasha]] || [[word:folayaka|folayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:folayafthaf|folayafthaf]] || [[word:folayafjaf|folayafjaf]] || [[word:folayafshaf|folayafshaf]] || [[word:folayafkaf|folayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:folayasha|folayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:folayshÃḋsha|folayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:folayrosha|folayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:folaymusha|folaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:folayasha|folayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofolaynkshÃḋsha|gofolaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofolaynkrosha|gofolaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofolaynkmusha|gofolaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofolaynkyasha|gofolaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:folalayasha|folalayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:folalayshÃḋsha|folalayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:folalayrosha|folalayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:folalaymusha|folalaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:folalayasha|folalayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofolalaynkshÃḋsha|gofolalaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofolalaynkrosha|gofolalaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofolalaynkmusha|gofolalaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofolalaynkyasha|gofolalaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:felÃḊyasha|felÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:felÃḊyshÃḋsha|felÃḊyshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:felÃḊyrosha|felÃḊyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:felÃḊymusha|felÃḊymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:felÃḊyasha|felÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofelÃḊynkshÃḋsha|gofelÃḊynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofelÃḊynkrosha|gofelÃḊynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofelÃḊynkmusha|gofelÃḊynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofelÃḊynkyasha|gofelÃḊynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:folfayasha|folfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:folfayshÃḋsha|folfayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:folfayrosha|folfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:folfaymusha|folfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:folfayasha|folfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofolfaynkshÃḋsha|gofolfaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofolfaynkrosha|gofolfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofolfaynkmusha|gofolfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofolfaynkyasha|gofolfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
